name: recoil_state_main_menu_transition_on_try_become_current
description: RecoilStateMainMenuTransition::OnTryBecomeCurrent activates video/HUD/audio pause and main-menu dialog setup.
known_limits: VC6 COFF byte compare fails with 253 unmasked mismatches (BN 321 bytes vs VC6 272 bytes).
Retail emits MSVC /GX SEH prologue/epilogue (fs: chain, handler 0x4c9463, EH state slots); isolated verify TU does not reproduce that frame from current source.
Blur path uses production zFMV_ActionBlur; smoke covers frontend route (skips blur) plus snapshot/dialog side effects.
